mapper.sql: CONT_NO, CONT_RECORD_GB_CD, ORG_NO, BRCH_NO, TOTAL_ISU_PT, TOTAL_ISU_CNT, TOTAL_USE_PT, TOTAL_USE_CNT, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from t_cont_record
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_cont_record
CONT_NO,
CONT_RECORD_GB_CD,
ORG_NO,
BRCH_NO,
TOTAL_ISU_PT,
TOTAL_ISU_CNT,
TOTAL_USE_PT,
TOTAL_USE_CNT,
REG_USER_ID,
REG_DT,
LAST_MOD_USER_ID,
LAST_MOD_DT,
#{contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{contRecordGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{brchNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{totalIsuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{totalIsuCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{totalUsePt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{totalUseCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_cont_record
CONT_NO = #{row.contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CONT_RECORD_GB_CD = #{row.contRecordGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_NO = #{row.orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
BRCH_NO = #{row.brchNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TOTAL_ISU_PT = #{row.totalIsuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TOTAL_ISU_CNT = #{row.totalIsuCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TOTAL_USE_PT = #{row.totalUsePt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
TOTAL_USE_CNT = #{row.totalUseCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT},
REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update t_cont_record set CONT_NO = #{row.contNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, CONT_RECORD_GB_CD = #{row.contRecordGbCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_NO = #{row.orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, BRCH_NO = #{row.brchNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TOTAL_ISU_PT = #{row.totalIsuPt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TOTAL_ISU_CNT = #{row.totalIsuCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TOTAL_USE_PT = #{row.totalUsePt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TOTAL_USE_CNT = #{row.totalUseCnt,jdbcType=BIGINT}, REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
